title: Marbled's Blackhole Sun
description: A resource pack that retextures the sun to a blackhole
body:
DESCRIPTION:
Marbled's Blackhole Sun is a simple resource pack that retextures the sun into a big scary blackhole! JOIN THE DISCORD HERE FOR PROGRESS AND ANNOUNCEMENTS! 
__________________________________________________________________________________________________________

NOTES:
Use Sun and Mood Celestial Configuration for a better and scarier experience!
This mod is only available on CurseForge and Modrinth.
Thank you to my Patrons for keeping this resource pack going!
- OnMod
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________

USAGE:

You may use this in your modpacks WITH credit.
You may use this resource pack in videos WITH credit and download link in description.
You may NOT re-distribute thisresource pack. 
You may NOT use or steal any content from this resource pack including textures or models. 
___________________________________________________________________________________________________________
